'''Mayjeln''' was a [[Sullustan/Legends|Sullustan]] scout.

==Biography==
Mayjeln was considered to be a courageous scout who succeeded in high-speed heroics and daring navigation.<ref name="AJ4" />

He reached a status of legendary; many Sullustan pilots years after him consider him a hero and would like to emulate his deeds.<ref name="AJ4" />

Sullustan trader [[Rai-Kalei]], who lived in the times of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], named his [[XS-800 light freighter/Legends|XS-800 light freighter]] [[Mayjeln (freighter)|''Mayjeln'']] in honor of his fellow. However, Rai-Kalei was not exactly a scout, but a smuggler.<ref name="AJ4" />
